markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on new content initiatives and refine the template creation process.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Initiatives:** GrowthX will create content (blogs, guides) for Lovable's top 5–10 use cases and automate integration doc generation.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [**Template Process Refinement:** Vikas will provide quality examples to set a consistent standard for GrowthX's template creation, which currently lacks a benchmark.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [**Source of Truth:** Vikas will provide the 3-part source of truth for integration docs (PRD, PMM brief, technical docs) by EOW, enabling Nico to build the automation workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [**Content Volume Adjustment:** The steady-state content volume will decrease from 15 to 10 items/week, starting in two weeks, to match a smaller remaining task list.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

## Topics

### Template Creation Process Review

  - [GrowthX's template creation process uses Atlas, an internal OS, to feed LLMs with artifacts (personas, research) to generate specs.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [**Problem:** The process lacks a consistent quality benchmark for app templates, which vary widely in complexity.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [**Solution:** Vikas will provide 2–3 examples across the complexity spectrum to establish a clear quality bar.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [**Action:** Megan will share the Notion/Airtable source documents for these artifacts, allowing Vikas to review and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)

### New Content Initiative: Use Cases

  - [**Goal:** Promote Lovable's top 5–10 use cases to showcase the platform's capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [**Format:** Blog posts and guides.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [**Action:** Vikas will send the project brief with the use case list.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [**Strategy:** GrowthX will cross-reference the list with keyword research to prioritize content that aligns with user search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)

### New Content Initiative: Integration Docs

  - [**Goal:** Automate integration doc generation to scale production beyond the current manual process.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [**Source of Truth:** Vikas defined a 3-part input for the automation workflow:](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [Product Requirements Doc (PRD)](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
      - [PMM Brief (messaging, audience)](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
      - [Technical Docs (product docs)](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [**Constraint:** The current quality of PRDs and PMM briefs is low, which could compromise the accuracy of the automated output.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [**Action:** Vikas will provide a handful of these source documents by EOW for initial testing.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Nico estimates a 3-day build for the workflow, followed by a calibration period to refine outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vikas:**](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
      - [Send the project brief with the top 5–10 use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
      - [Provide 2–3 template quality examples.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [Deliver source documents (PRD, PMM brief, tech docs) for integration docs by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [**Megan:**](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [Share Notion/Airtable access for the source artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [Integrate new use cases into the content plan after keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [**Nico:**](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [Build the integration doc automation workflow upon receiving source documents.](https://fathom.video/share/PotjdqzQGxx4YrTq9gz2cLDAQ63HdJXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
